listening.title: Listening: What happened?
listening.transcript: I was cooking dinner when the phone rang. We were walking home when it started to rain.

questions.question: What was the speaker doing when the phone rang?
questions.explanation: "I was cooking dinner when the phone rang."

listening.title: Listening: Review — A surprise
listening.transcript: I was walking to the shop where I used to buy bread. A man who I knew told me that the shop was closed.

questions.question: What did the man tell the speaker?
questions.explanation: "told me that the shop was closed."
